text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While strolling through the park, I catch sight of
Fine Motion playing with some children, and Air
Shakur beside her acting as chaperone.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Three, three... And this ooone's... three too!

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I found another spot that looks like it might
have a four-leaf clover!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Then let's get looking!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What's up, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Break time's over, and we're not done gathering
partner running data. Hurry up and let's get back
to training.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Shakur. We won't be much longer! I
couldn't find one last time, so I really want to get
these kids a four-leaf clover today.

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text: Heeey! C'mon already!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oops, sorry! I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hold on a—dammit!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, four-leaf clovers are amazing. I can't
believe how tough they are to find!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... Are you sure it's okay for Your Highness to be looking like hell over a bunch of plants?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And how come you're wasting all your energy on this stuff? I thought it was the three-leaf clovers everyone in Ireland loves so much.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I guess it's because I'm here now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Searching together for something people in this
country really care about means we can all
celebrate when we find it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm in Japan after all! I want to cherish every
minute of my time here, even the time I spend
looking for clovers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, screw it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We should look somewhere with more foot traffic.
You're more likely to find them in patches that
get trampled on when they're sprouting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Save it. Let's just get this over with.

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Got one! Wow! Hey, come look at this, you two! I
found one!

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa. You may be grumpy, but you sure know
a lot!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch, get off of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: → H-hey! Who said you could take pictures?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's one more memory to treasure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah, dammit! That's it, I'm going home!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait a second! It came out really well. I'll
send it to you later, okay?!
